title: jaramilloa hylibates
intro: Jaramilloa hylibates is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, Jaramilloa hylibates is prepared as a decoction by boiling the leaves in water, and it is also used in herbal teas and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
